_comment: PROCESS-QUALITY BASELINE — structure documentation only. Do NOT copy this file into
quality/process-baseline.json by hand: a baseline is EARNED, never installed.
It is created and tightened exclusively by `node scripts/check-process-ratchet.mjs --update`
after a truthful green run. While this file is absent (or still carries "_template": true,
which the ratchet treats as absent), check-process-ratchet renders
'Result: NOT-EARNED (pending baseline)' — it never prints PASS it has not earned.
Direction guard: --update rejects any write that lowers acceptanceCoverage, raises
vacuousPasses, or widens/removes a warningBudgets entry (exit 1). Loosening requires a
human waiver artifact under docs/qa/waivers/ plus an owner-signed RULES-CHANGELOG.md entry.
